pipelineId.description: UUID of the pipeline item this run is executing. Also the parentId of this run item.

status.description: Overall run status. pending=not started, running=phase active, waiting=blocked at gate, complete=all phases done, failed=unrecoverable error, cancelled=manually stopped.

params.description: Parameter values supplied at run creation. Keys match the pipeline's params[].name definitions. The runner substitutes these into instructions and inputQuery, and injects the full object into each agent's context preamble.

triggeredBy.description: UUID of the Kanecta item that triggered this run. Null for manually triggered runs.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run moved from pending to running.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run reached a terminal state.

currentPhaseId.description: ID of the phase currently executing. Null when pending, waiting at a gate, or in a terminal state.

phases.description: Per-phase execution records, one per phase in the pipeline definition. All present from run creation — not-yet-started phases have status pending and attempt 0.

phaseId.description: Matches the id of the corresponding phase in the pipeline definition.

status.description: pending=not started, running=agent executing, waiting=gate blocked, complete=success, failed=error exhausted retries, skipped=bypassed by runIf or upstream onFailure.

attempt.description: Current attempt number, 1-based. 0 while pending. Increments on each retry and on escalation invocation.

escalated.description: True if the fallback agent was invoked for this phase.

startedAt.description: Timestamp of first agent invocation. Not reset on retry.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when agent finished its final invocation. May predate gate clearance.

itemsProduced.description: UUIDs of all items written during this phase across all attempts. Updated incrementally. The gate evaluator checks meta.confidence on these items.

gateResult.description: null=not yet evaluated. passed=items met threshold automatically. blocked=items below threshold, run waiting. approved=human explicitly approved via kanecta_approve_gate.

approvedAt.description: Timestamp of explicit gate approval by a human. Null if gate cleared automatically or not yet approved.

approvedBy.description: Identity of the human who approved the gate. Null if automatic or pending.

error.description: Error message if phase failed. Null otherwise.
Top-level error if the run failed. Null otherwise.
